text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today Tracen is holding a cops and robbers
tournament. This event allows elementary school
students aiming for Tracen to interact with
current students at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text:
The cops win if they capture all of the robbers
before the time runs out!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text: But if even one robber remains, the robbers win!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm a robber, so I just need to make sure I don't
get caught while the clock is ticking, right? Piece
of pie!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text:
Trainers and volunteers from the shopping district
are here to ensure that the team they've been
assigned to plays safely!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? If you're here, that means... you're a robber
too?!
choice_data_list: I'm just here to keep an eye on things.
I'm just here to keep an eye on things.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the details! You're one of us! I'll
smash right through everyone, so you'll have
nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There are so many Tracen Academy students
here! C'mon, cops! We've gotta win this!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best! I can't be the reason my
team loses!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Forgive my intrusion, but I'll be offering my
assistance to ensure that the cops team emerges
triumphant.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Leave everything to me. I shall create an effective
team strategy that will keep your stamina levels in
mind.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Their team's totally pumped!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Awww yeah! We'll just have to step up our game!
Let's go, robbers!

text_block_list.name: Tournament Chairperson
text_block_list.text: Right, everyone! On your marks, get set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BANG!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: ALL RIGHT! Run away as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game starts with a chaotic game of
cat-and-mouse, but as time passes, the cop team
begins to slow down.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey! How come the cops aren't chasing us like
they were before?! What's goin' on?! Don't keep
me waitin' here!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Running around haphazardly only serves to
deplete our energy.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Let us calmly lie in wait and observe the enemy's
movements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Twin Turbo that the cops are going with
Ikuno Dictus's strategy of minimal energy
consumption and efficient arrests.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! The heck's with that?! Boooooriiiiing!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run around! I wanna play tag with
everyone!
choice_data_list:
You'll fall right into their trap if you rush out
now.

You'll fall right into their trap if you rush out
now.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm super fast. I'll be totally fine.
choice_data_list: Do you have a strategy in mind?
Do you have a strategy in mind?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Nope, but I'm tough, so I'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe Twin Turbo's planning to draw the
attention of the whole cop team herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe Twin Turbo's planning to draw the
attention of the whole cop team herself.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! Turbooo... GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Found ya, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Turbo?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Waaait! I'm not letting you get away, coppers!
Take me on, fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait! Wait! Stay awaaay!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you chasing after meee?!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's happening?

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Is this a special rule or something? Should we run
away too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No. Please stay as you are. I'd like you all to
remain on standby.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...It would be best to stop her as soon as possible,
but that would be a tough task.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yahooooo! Wait up, punks! Ahahaha! Now we're really playing cops and robbers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Twin Turbo somehow chasing the cops, the
cops and robbers tournament descends into
mayhem and is eventually called to a temporary
halt.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaha! You're not goin' anywhere,
coppers! Take me on, fair and—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-Turbo?!

text_block_list.name: Older Patrolman
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Are you okay?! That was quite the
face-plant...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Run with... me... fair and... square... Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Bleh...

text_block_list.name: Patrolling Trainer
text_block_list.text: Uh, did she just pass out with a smile on her face?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What happened to the tournament?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What?! I-it's o-over?! But I didn't even get to run!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Sob... Awww, this suuuucks! But I'll totally win next tiiiiime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo bawls her eyes out as she swears an
oath to the setting sun...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What?! Why?! No, no, no! Nuh-uh!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run! I gotta run!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Cops! Now!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ikuno?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Siege successful. Your loud voice served as a
beacon, allowing me to lead everyone here
undetected.

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You can't get away now, Twin Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Now that's what I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: All you guys are gonna chase after me?! I'm all in! C'mon, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four... Six of you! Six against
one! Can you keep up with me?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Turbo BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No! Wait, everyone! If you try to keep up with
Turbo, you'll—

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I-It's no good...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
—only fall behind. I should have warned you
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, both Twin Turbo and the cops run out
of steam and the tournament ends in a draw...
